name: Wandering Creek Golf Course
about: Wandering Creek Golf Club is a premier 9-hole golf course in Marshalltown, Iowa, known for its well-kept greens and fun, yet challenging layout. It features a creek as a hazard on four holes and caters to golfers of all skill levels. The venue added two Full Swing Golf Simulators in January 2021, providing year-round golfing opportunities. Players can choose from over 80 virtual courses worldwide, utilize the driving range for practice, or participate in winter leagues. The on-site clubhouse offers a social hub with Happy Hour specials, featuring bottled and tap beer, liquor, and wine, making it a versatile destination for both on-course and simulated play.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access with two Full Swing simulators featuring 80+ global courses
Flexible group sizes, accommodating up to eight players for team formats
Social clubhouse atmosphere with daily Happy Hour specials and food options
Convenient online booking system for both outdoor golf and simulator sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks available at the clubhouse for before and after rounds
Happy Hour specials everyday with bottled and tap beer, liquor, and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: Two Full Swing simulators installed in January 2021, featuring 80+ golf courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own clubs for both outdoor golf and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; however, the clubhouse offers snacks and Happy Hour specials with beer, liquor, and wine.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: It takes 2 hours for 2 golfers or 4 hours for 4 golfers to complete 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering a welcoming environment for families and accommodating younger golfers.
